title: Cumb
bodyText:
Goblin. Was *inside* the party's captured Bag of Holding; negotiated survival by organizing its contents while wearing a french maid outfit. Feed twice a day. Found the two S-marked bodies in the bag. Has some connection to **Trunks**. Portrait: art/cumb.png (has a character sheet PDF in the import archive).
